inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Message
inputs.description: Text to post in the Slack channel.

inputs.name: title
inputs.label: Header Title
inputs.description: Overrides the configured header title at runtime.

inputs.name: webhook
inputs.label: Webhook URL Override
inputs.description: Overrides the configured webhook URL at runtime.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Pass-through
outputs.description: The message that was sent, passed unchanged for chaining.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if sending to Slack failed.
